metadata.title: Khyaal Engineering Pulse
metadata.vision: Become the leading platform for active aging and community engagement for seniors in India, delivering exceptional experiences through technology, personalized service, and meaningful connections.

epics.name: Platform Modernization Epic
epics.objective: Modernize legacy systems and enhance platform capabilities
epics.scope: Website migration, 50Above50 improvements, CRM integration, API enhancements
epics.keyDeliverables: 29 pages migrated, subscription launch, security hardening
epics.successMetrics: Page speed improvement 40%, revenue growth, security compliance 95%+

epics.name: Analytics & Intelligence Epic
epics.objective: Build comprehensive data foundation and AI capabilities
epics.scope: CDP development, analytics dashboards, AI agents, recommendation engines
epics.keyDeliverables: Gold Tier analytics, sales AI agents, ML recommendations
epics.successMetrics: Data-driven decisions 80%+, AI conversion 15%+, recommendation accuracy 85%+

epics.name: Infrastructure Optimization Epic
epics.objective: Optimize cloud infrastructure and enhance security posture
epics.scope: AWS to GCP migration, cost optimization, monitoring setup
epics.keyDeliverables: Cost reduction 30%, improved monitoring, security compliance
epics.successMetrics: Infrastructure cost savings 30%+, system uptime 99.9%+, security response < 1hr

okrs.objective: Modernize platform infrastructure and achieve security excellence

keyResults.description: Migrate 100% of legacy pages to new platform
Launch $99 subscription tier with payment processing
Complete VAPT and achieve 90%+ security compliance

okrs.objective: Build data-driven decision foundation with AI capabilities

keyResults.description: Launch Data Hub with feature engineering and metrics
Deploy AI Sales Agent for tour-specific outreach

okrs.objective: Reduce infrastructure costs and improve reliability

keyResults.description: Complete AWS to GCP migration for Pulse services

sprints.name: Foundation Sprint
sprints.goal: Establish modern platform foundation and infrastructure optimization

sprints.name: Analytics Foundation Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete platform migration and establish data analytics foundation

sprints.name: Security & AI Sprint
sprints.goal: Launch subscription service and initiate AI agent development

releases.name: v2.1 Platform Foundation
releases.features: 29 legacy pages migrated, 99 subscription launch, basic security
releases.successCriteria: All pages migrated with 30% performance improvement, subscription processing payments
releases.impact: Improved user experience, new revenue stream, security baseline

releases.name: v2.2 Security Hardening
releases.features: VAPT completion, crypto redirect fixes, security monitoring
releases.successCriteria: All critical VAPT issues resolved, security monitoring active

items.text: Legacy page refresh – 29 pages migrated and modernized
items.note: Migrated 29 legacy pages to new platform with modern responsive design, optimized assets, and improved UX patterns.
items.usecase: Improves page speed by 40%, enhances usability, and provides better mobile experience for senior users.
acceptanceCriteria: All 29 pages migrated with responsive design
Page load time improved by 40% minimum
SEO scores above 90 for all pages

items.note: Launched premium subscription tier with Razorpay integration, user dashboard, and automated billing cycles.
items.usecase: Supports recurring revenue model and provides premium features to engaged users.
acceptanceCriteria: Razorpay payment gateway integrated and tested

items.note: Created dedicated event landing page with registration form, countdown timer, and event details.
items.usecase: Helps users register easily and access all event information in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page published with registration form
Countdown timer showing days to event
Integration with CRM for lead capture

items.text: Emailer templates for Travel and Axis Max
items.note: Built reusable, responsive email templates for marketing campaigns with dynamic content blocks.
items.usecase: Speeds up campaign launches and ensures brand consistency across all email communications.
acceptanceCriteria: Two templates created (Travel and Axis Max)

items.note: Improved chatbot interface with better visual design, loading states, and error handling.
items.usecase: Makes customer support interaction smoother and more intuitive for senior users.
acceptanceCriteria: UI redesign with larger touch targets

items.note: Integrated Pulse analytics SDK to track user behavior, page views, and conversion events across the website.
items.usecase: Provides comprehensive analytics for data-driven decision making and user journey optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse SDK integrated on all website pages
Key events tracking verified (pageview, signup, purchase)

items.note: Conducted root cause analysis for incorrect website redirect to crypto domain. Issue identified in DNS configuration and server routing rules.
items.usecase: Prevents users from being redirected to wrong domains, ensuring brand trust and security.

items.note: Kicked off comprehensive Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT) with Appknox security platform for entire web application.
items.usecase: Identifies and mitigates security vulnerabilities early to ensure platform safety and regulatory compliance.

items.note: Implementing Google reCAPTCHA v3 on all user-facing forms to prevent bot submissions and spam.
items.usecase: Reduces spam form submissions by 95%+ and protects platform from automated attacks.
acceptanceCriteria: reCAPTCHA v3 integrated on all forms
Fallback to v2 for low scores
Form submission analytics tracking spam reduction

items.note: Creating dedicated event landing page for Rajkot event with localized content, registration form, and venue information.
items.usecase: Helps users in Rajkot region register easily and access event-specific information.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page published with Gujarati language support option
Registration form with Rajkot venue details
Google Maps integration for venue location

items.note: Adding missing analytics event tracking for key user actions not currently captured in Pulse.
items.usecase: Improves data completeness for journey analysis and enables better conversion funnel tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Gap analysis completed for missing events
Event data validated in Pulse dashboard

items.note: Automating Slack/email notifications during page migration process with progress tracking and issue alerts.
items.usecase: Keeps team informed of migration progress in real-time with less manual status updates.

items.note: Creating reusable content blocks in CMS (hero sections, testimonials, CTAs) for faster page building.
items.usecase: Speeds up website content creation by 60% and ensures consistent design patterns.

items.note: Implementing fixes for critical and high-severity security vulnerabilities identified in VAPT report.
items.usecase: Strengthens website security posture and achieves 95%+ compliance with security standards.

items.note: Implementing stronger server-side validation and redirect protection based on RCA findings.
items.usecase: Prevents malicious redirects and ensures users always reach correct Khyaal domains.
acceptanceCriteria: Server-side checks for all redirect URLs

items.note: Planning and designing reusable event page templates with configurable sections for faster event launches.
items.usecase: Reduces event page creation time from 2 days to 2 hours with consistent branding.
acceptanceCriteria: CMS integration for easy template selection

items.text: Events listing and joining via Web Zoom SDK
items.note: Allow users to join Zoom events directly from the website without OTP login. Authentication via secure app-generated code or QR code scan with JWT token generation.
items.usecase: Enables seamless event joining from website, reducing friction and improving attendance rates by 30%.
acceptanceCriteria: Zoom Web SDK integrated on event pages
JWT token generation and validation secure

items.note: Complete redesign of 50Above50 homepage with modern UI, improved visual hierarchy, and senior-friendly accessibility features.
items.usecase: Creates stronger first impression and improves user engagement by 25%, resulting in higher event registrations.
acceptanceCriteria: New design implemented with larger fonts and touch targets
Hero section highlights upcoming events prominently
Mobile-responsive design tested on common devices

items.note: Simplified category information pages with clearer descriptions, visual enhancements, and improved navigation for 50 categories.
items.usecase: Helps users understand 50Above50 program categories 40% faster, leading to better category selection and participation.
acceptanceCriteria: All 50 category pages updated with new design
Category descriptions simplified for senior audience
Visual icons added for quick category identification

items.note: Enabled self-service certificate download portal for participants who completed 50Above50 categories, with secure authentication.
items.usecase: Reduces support requests by 60% and provides instant certificate access to returning participants.
acceptanceCriteria: Download portal accessible from user dashboard
Certificates generated with user name and category
PDF format optimized for printing and sharing

items.note: Created bundled offer combining 50Above50 2026 registration with app membership at discounted price point.
items.usecase: Encourages membership sign-ups with 30% bundle discount, driving recurring revenue and user retention.
acceptanceCriteria: Bundle offer page created with clear pricing
Bundle automatically applies both registration and membership

items.note: Implemented coin-based redemption system allowing users to unlock 50Above50 categories using earned reward coins.
items.usecase: Increases platform engagement by 40% and provides gamification incentive for continued participation.
acceptanceCriteria: Coin redemption flow working on category pages
Coin balance updated in real-time after redemption
Category access granted immediately after redemption
Redemption history tracked in user profile

items.note: Refined category structure by merging overlapping categories, updating descriptions, and adding new categories while maintaining exactly 50 total. Migrated all existing user data to align with new structure.
items.usecase: Ensures consistent, optimized category framework for better content organization, user navigation, and program clarity.
acceptanceCriteria: All user data migrated without loss
New structure tested with sample users

items.note: Connected 50Above50 website lead forms to Zoho CRM for automated lead capture and nurturing workflows.
items.usecase: Improves lead tracking efficiency by 70% and enables automated follow-up campaigns for registrations.
acceptanceCriteria: All lead forms connected to Zoho API
Lead data synced in real-time to CRM

items.note: Integrated Pulse analytics SDK to track user behavior, category views, registrations, and engagement patterns across 50Above50 website.
items.usecase: Provides comprehensive analytics showing how users interact with categories, enabling data-driven program optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse SDK integrated on all pages
Key events tracked (category view, registration, certificate download)
Data flowing to Pulse analytics dashboard

items.note: Initiated comprehensive security review for 50Above50 website including vulnerability scanning and security best practices assessment.
items.usecase: Identifies potential security issues early, ensuring participant data protection and platform trustworthiness.

items.note: Adding missing activity tracking events for 50Above50 user actions not currently captured (coin usage, certificate downloads, category completions).
items.usecase: Improves campaign targeting accuracy and enables better conversion funnel analysis for the 50Above50 program.
acceptanceCriteria: Gap analysis identifying all missing events completed
All critical events implemented and tested
Event data validated in Pulse dashboard

items.note: Implementing security fixes for vulnerabilities identified in 50Above50 VAPT report, prioritizing critical and high-severity issues.
items.usecase: Strengthens 50Above50 website security posture and protects participant data from potential breaches.

items.note: Planning seamless transition from website to mobile app for 50Above50 participants, including deep linking and context preservation.
items.usecase: Provides smoother cross-platform experience, reducing friction and improving app adoption by 35%.
acceptanceCriteria: Deep linking implemented for all category pages
A/B testing shows improved app adoption

items.note: Built comprehensive backend system for coin-based rewards with transaction tracking, balance management, and redemption history.
items.usecase: Enables users to redeem 50Above50 categories using earned coins, driving engagement and platform stickiness.

items.note: Developed bidirectional connector between 50Above50 CRM and Zoho CRM for automated data synchronization of leads, contacts, and activities.
items.usecase: Keeps lead records updated in real-time, enabling marketing automation and reducing manual data entry by 80%.
acceptanceCriteria: Bidirectional sync working for leads and contacts
Sync conflicts handled with priority rules

items.note: Enhancing speed and reliability of CRM data synchronization during migration with optimized batch processing and error handling.
items.usecase: Ensures CRM data is accurate, up-to-date, and reliable for reporting and decision-making with 99%+ data integrity.
acceptanceCriteria: Error handling with automatic retry logic

items.note: Enhanced admin controls for Tambola game management including board generation, winner verification, and prize management features.
items.usecase: Makes Tambola event management 50% faster and reduces manual errors during game execution.

items.note: Simplified event creation and editing workflow with improved form validation, auto-save functionality, and streamlined UI.
items.usecase: Speeds up event setup by 60%, reducing admin time from 15 minutes to 6 minutes per event.
acceptanceCriteria: Form validation with clear error messages
Bulk edit capability for recurring events
Event templates for common event types

items.note: Organized events into hierarchical categories and sub-categories with filtering and search capabilities for better admin organization.
items.usecase: Improves event discoverability by 70% and makes event management more scalable as event inventory grows.
acceptanceCriteria: Filtering by category working in admin panel
Category assignment required for new events

items.note: Maintained backward compatibility for legacy admin workflows and data structures while migrating to new system architecture.
items.usecase: Avoids disruption for existing admin users and ensures zero downtime during system transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: All legacy admin functions still working
Deprecation warnings added for future removal

items.note: Delivered multiple admin panel improvements requested by product team including reporting enhancements, user management features, and workflow optimizations.
items.usecase: Supports product team needs and enables better business operations with enhanced admin capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: All requested features implemented and tested
Training materials provided to admin users

items.note: Updated backend API endpoints for Tambola game features including board generation, winner declaration, and prize distribution logic.
items.usecase: Supports enhanced Tambola product flow with automated game management and real-time updates.
acceptanceCriteria: API endpoints for board creation working
Real-time game state updates via WebSocket

items.note: Enhanced API to support hierarchical event categories and sub-categories with improved querying and filtering capabilities.
items.usecase: Makes event setup cleaner and enables better event organization for admin and frontend teams.
acceptanceCriteria: Category metadata returned in event queries

items.note: Implemented API versioning and compatibility layer to maintain support for legacy client integrations during platform migration.
items.usecase: Prevents breaks during updates and ensures zero downtime for existing mobile app users.
acceptanceCriteria: Legacy endpoints maintained with deprecation warnings
All existing integrations tested and working

items.note: Migrated identity verification API from legacy KYC provider to new protocol with enhanced security and compliance features.
items.usecase: Keeps verification process compliant with updated regulations and improves verification success rate by 25%.
acceptanceCriteria: Fallback to legacy provider for failures

items.note: Added cursor-based pagination to event listing APIs for improved performance when handling large event datasets.
items.usecase: Makes the app 70% faster for users browsing event lists with hundreds of events.

items.note: Built complete RESTful API suite for ₹99 subscription management including purchase, renewal, cancellation, and status queries.
items.usecase: Supports subscription purchase and lifecycle management with automated billing integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook handlers for payment events implemented

items.note: Implemented rule-based event access control system supporting membership tiers, user segments, and custom restrictions.
items.usecase: Controls who can join specific events based on membership status, enabling tiered access model.
acceptanceCriteria: Rule engine for access control implemented
Multiple restriction types supported (membership, segment, custom)
Clear error messages for denied access

items.note: Built API endpoints for coin-based redemption system with transaction management, balance queries, and redemption history.
items.usecase: Allows reward coin usage across the platform with real-time balance updates and transaction tracking.

items.note: Developed API integration layer connecting platform backend with Zoho CRM for bidirectional lead and contact synchronization.
items.usecase: Keeps CRM records in sync automatically, reducing manual data entry by 85% and enabling marketing automation.
acceptanceCriteria: Error handling and retry logic tested

items.note: Initiated comprehensive security testing for all API endpoints including authentication, authorization, and data validation.
items.usecase: Identifies API-level security vulnerabilities early and ensures data protection compliance.

items.text: Membership status sync via Razorpay to Pulse
items.note: Capturing all membership status updates (initiated, charged, started, cancelled, expired) via Razorpay webhooks and syncing to Pulse for analytics.
items.usecase: Provides complete visibility of user membership lifecycle for better tracking, automation, and targeted engagement campaigns.
acceptanceCriteria: Razorpay webhook handlers implemented for all statuses
Event data transformed and sent to Pulse
Retry logic for failed syncs working

items.note: Implementing API security fixes for vulnerabilities identified in penetration testing including authentication bypass, injection flaws, and authorization issues.
items.usecase: Strengthens API security posture and protects user data from potential exploits.

items.note: Building API foundation for Centerstage product area supporting content showcasing and user-generated content features.
items.usecase: Prepares backend for future product expansion into user-generated content and community showcasing.

items.note: Designing asynchronous queue-based architecture for handling Centerstage content processing, moderation, and publishing workflows.
items.usecase: Makes the system more scalable by decoupling content processing from API requests, handling 10x more content submissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Worker processes for async tasks implemented
Job retry and failure handling working

items.note: Planning real-time messaging backend API with WebSocket support for Centerstage chat and messenger features.
items.usecase: Enables future in-app messaging support for community interaction and peer-to-peer communication.

items.text: Support for app-code authentication in API
items.note: Implementing alternative authentication mechanism using temporary app-generated codes or QR codes instead of OTP, enabling seamless Web Zoom SDK integration.
items.usecase: Provides frictionless authentication for web-based event joining, reducing login time from 60s to 5s and improving attendance by 30%.
acceptanceCriteria: Code validation and JWT issuance working
Security audit completed for auth flow

items.note: Building streak tracking system API to monitor consecutive user activity (event attendance, task completion) with milestone rewards and gamification.
items.usecase: Encourages consistent engagement through gamification, increasing daily active users by 40% and improving retention.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard API for streak display implemented

items.note: Migrated Pulse analytics infrastructure from AWS to Google Cloud Platform (GCP) including data pipelines, storage, and compute workloads.
items.usecase: Improves platform stability and reduces operational complexity while consolidating cloud providers for better cost management.
acceptanceCriteria: All Pulse data pipelines migrated to GCP

items.note: Optimized GCP resource utilization through rightsizing instances, implementing autoscaling policies, and eliminating unused resources.
items.usecase: Reduces monthly cloud infrastructure costs by 25% while maintaining performance and reliability.
acceptanceCriteria: Autoscaling policies configured for all services

items.note: Implemented secure session management for Pulse analytics console with JWT-based authentication, session timeout, and refresh token support.
items.usecase: Makes console access smoother for analytics users with persistent sessions and auto-login capabilities, reducing login friction by 80%.

items.note: Optimized database queries and indexing strategies for user analytics dashboards, reducing query execution time by 70%.
items.usecase: Improves user reporting performance from 15s to 4s average load time, enabling faster data-driven decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Database indexes optimized for common queries
Query plan analysis shows improved performance

items.note: Added filtering capabilities for null and empty values in user analytics queries, enabling identification of incomplete user profiles.
items.usecase: Helps identify and fix data quality issues by finding users with missing profile information for targeted outreach.
acceptanceCriteria: Null/empty filters working for all user attributes
Filter UI clearly shows null vs empty distinction
Query performance not degraded by null filters

items.note: Implemented chronological activity timeline for individual users showing all events, status changes, and interactions over time.
items.usecase: Improves customer journey visibility and enables support teams to quickly understand user history and context.
acceptanceCriteria: Timeline shows all user events chronologically
Event details expandable for more context
Performance tested with users having 1000+ events

items.note: Implemented near real-time data synchronization pipeline updating user profiles in Pulse analytics within 30 seconds of source changes.
items.usecase: Makes journey triggers and segment evaluations more current with <30s data latency instead of hourly batch updates.
acceptanceCriteria: User data synced within 30 seconds of changes
Sync errors handled with retry logic

items.note: Optimized event analytics queries through improved indexing, query restructuring, and caching strategies, reducing load time by 65%.
items.usecase: Makes event analytics reporting more responsive, improving from 20s to 7s average dashboard load time.
acceptanceCriteria: Event indexes optimized for common patterns
Caching implemented for frequently accessed data

items.note: Added null and empty value filtering for event properties, enabling data quality analysis and identification of incomplete event tracking.
items.usecase: Improves data quality visibility by identifying events with missing properties for debugging and tracking improvements.
acceptanceCriteria: Null filters working for all event properties
UI clearly distinguishes null vs empty values

items.note: Implemented Indian Standard Time (IST) timezone display for all event timestamps in analytics dashboards and reports.
items.usecase: Makes event timing data easier to read and understand for India-based teams, eliminating UTC conversion confusion.
acceptanceCriteria: All timestamps displayed in IST by default
User preference for timezone selection working

items.note: Added null and empty value filtering in segment and cohort definition rules, enabling precise targeting based on missing data.
items.usecase: Makes audience targeting more accurate by identifying users with incomplete profiles for re-engagement campaigns.
acceptanceCriteria: Null filters working in segment builder
Cohort rules support null value conditions
Filter preview shows accurate user counts

items.note: Enabled importing external user lists (CSV uploads, API integrations) for use in segmentation and cohort building.
items.usecase: Brings offline and third-party user data into Pulse for unified segmentation and campaign targeting.
acceptanceCriteria: CSV upload working with field mapping
API integration for external data sources
External users accessible in segment builder

items.text: Clone support for segments and cohorts
items.note: Implemented one-click cloning for segments and cohorts, allowing quick duplication and modification of existing audience definitions.
items.usecase: Saves time when creating similar audiences, reducing setup from 10 minutes to 1 minute for variant audiences.
acceptanceCriteria: Clone button available on all segments and cohorts

items.text: Utility support for DOB, current time, and event time
items.note: Added advanced date and time-based filtering utilities including birthday calculations, relative time comparisons, and event timing logic.
items.usecase: Makes targeting more flexible with birthday campaigns, time-sensitive promotions, and behavior-based timing rules.
acceptanceCriteria: DOB-based filters working (birthday this month, age range)
Current time comparisons functional (time of day, day of week)
Event time relative filters working (last 7 days, between dates)

items.note: Implemented automated cohort refresh schedules (daily, weekly, monthly) to keep dynamic audience lists up-to-date automatically.
items.usecase: Keeps audience lists current without manual intervention, ensuring campaigns always target the right users.

items.note: Enabled journeys to trigger and process users from external data sources (CSV uploads, API imports) in addition to platform users.
items.usecase: Expands campaign reach to offline and third-party audiences, enabling unified omnichannel journeys.
acceptanceCriteria: External users can enter journeys via API
Journey actions work for external users
User data merged correctly during journey execution

items.note: Implemented one-click journey duplication allowing marketers to copy complex journey configurations and modify for new campaigns.
items.usecase: Speeds up journey setup from 30 minutes to 5 minutes by reusing proven journey templates.
acceptanceCriteria: Clone button available on journey dashboard
All journey steps and conditions cloned correctly

items.text: Utility support for DOB, current time, and event time
items.note: Added advanced date/time-based journey logic including birthday triggers, time-of-day actions, and event timing comparisons.
items.usecase: Improves journey personalization with birthday wishes, optimal send time logic, and behavior-based timing rules.
acceptanceCriteria: DOB-based triggers working (birthday today, this week, this month)
Time-of-day actions functional (morning vs evening sends)
Event time comparisons working (within X days of event)

items.note: Optimized journey execution engine through improved queue processing, parallel execution, and database query optimization reducing latency by 60%.
items.usecase: Handles 10x more concurrent journeys reliably with improved speed and reduced server load.

items.note: Added sophisticated conditional journey entry logic based on user attributes, behavior patterns, and event combinations.
items.usecase: Targets users more precisely by triggering journeys only when multiple conditions are met (e.g., high-value user + cart abandonment).
acceptanceCriteria: Multiple condition types supported (attribute, event, segment)
Condition preview shows accurate user counts

items.note: Added null and empty value filtering in journey decision nodes, enabling branching based on missing data.
items.usecase: Makes journey flows more accurate by handling users with incomplete data differently (e.g., request missing info).
acceptanceCriteria: Null filters working in all decision nodes
Journey branches correctly based on null values

items.note: Added journey action nodes for automatically logging data to Google Sheets and sending Slack notifications during journey execution.
items.usecase: Reduces manual follow-up work by 75% through automated data logging and team notifications for key journey events.
acceptanceCriteria: Google Sheets action writes data correctly

items.note: Implemented user tagging within journeys and tag-based filtering for journey entry and decision nodes.
items.usecase: Improves targeting and personalization by dynamically tagging users based on journey behavior and filtering by tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Tag filters functional in entry and decision nodes

items.note: Enable dynamic logic creation within user journeys using custom expressions (JavaScript-like syntax) for advanced personalization and decision-making.
items.usecase: Allows defining complex dynamic conditions to control journey flow, enabling highly personalized actions and branching based on calculated user data.
acceptanceCriteria: Common functions library available (math, date, string)

items.note: Implemented automated synchronization of Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) device tokens from app to Pulse campaign system.
items.usecase: Ensures push notifications reach the right devices with 99%+ delivery accuracy by keeping device tokens current.
acceptanceCriteria: Token sync working in real-time on app launch
Token updates captured on device changes
Sync monitoring and error alerts functional

items.note: Enabled automatic Firebase topic creation and subscription management based on user segments and cohorts.
items.usecase: Speeds up messaging to new audiences by automatically creating topic groups, reducing setup time from 10 minutes to instant.
acceptanceCriteria: Topic unsubscription on segment exit working

items.note: Implemented campaign scheduling feature allowing marketers to set future send times for push notification and email campaigns.
items.usecase: Improves campaign timing with optimal send times, enabling better engagement rates through strategic scheduling.
acceptanceCriteria: Campaigns sent at scheduled time accurately
Cancel option available for scheduled campaigns

items.note: Built comprehensive campaign history and logging interface showing all sent campaigns with delivery metrics, audience details, and content.
items.usecase: Makes campaign performance tracking easier with searchable history and detailed analytics for all past campaigns.
acceptanceCriteria: Campaign history showing all past campaigns
Delivery metrics displayed (sent, delivered, opened, clicked)

items.note: Built AI-powered voice agent using LLM and text-to-speech technology to handle initial sales calls automatically with natural conversation flow.
items.usecase: Helps reach out to 5x more users faster while reducing manual calling effort by 70%, enabling scalable tour promotion.
acceptanceCriteria: AI agent makes outbound calls successfully
Natural conversation flow tested with sample users
Call transfer to human agent working when needed

items.text: AI Sales Agent – Call summarization setup
items.note: Implemented automated call summarization using AI transcription and LLM analysis. Working via Exotel; evaluating Plivo where recording is limited.
items.usecase: Provides instant call insights and summaries without manual review, saving 80% of supervisor review time.
acceptanceCriteria: AI summary captures key points (interest level, objections, next steps)
Summary quality validated by sales team

items.note: Configured AI calling agent with tour-specific knowledge base including tour details, pricing, FAQs, and objection handling for targeted conversations.
items.usecase: Enables personalized outreach for specific tours with accurate information, improving engagement and conversion rates by 25%.
acceptanceCriteria: Tour knowledge base integrated with agent
Objection responses configured for common scenarios

items.text: Sales Agent – Specific Tours Pilot launch tesing, stakeholder alignment
items.note: Preparing for internal pilot testing by aligning stakeholders, refining prompts and responses, and gathering initial feedback for improvements.
items.usecase: Ensures the AI sales agent is validated internally with real scenarios before external rollout, reducing launch risks.
acceptanceCriteria: Pilot test plan created and approved
Test calls completed with 10+ internal users

items.note: Finalizing AI agent conversation scripts including sales pitch, objection handling, closing techniques, and intent/rating capture logic.
items.usecase: Improves conversation quality and conversion rates by 30% through refined, tested prompts and natural dialogue flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Sales pitch script finalized and tested

items.text: Plivo setup for India & recording feasibility
items.note: Setting up Plivo voice platform for Indian phone numbers and evaluating call recording capabilities, costs, and limitations. Manual recording remains fallback.
items.usecase: Enables scalable calling infrastructure for India market with clarity on recording capabilities for quality monitoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Test calls working with Indian numbers

items.note: Exploring call recording technical setup with Plivo, including API integration, storage, cost implications, and compliance requirements.
items.usecase: Helps review call quality, train AI agent, and maintain compliance records for audit and improvement purposes.
acceptanceCriteria: Manual recording process documented as fallback

items.note: Upgrading AI assistant with improved LLM model, better context handling, memory persistence, and enhanced response quality using RAG architecture.
items.usecase: Provides smarter, more contextual assistance with 50% better response relevance to enhance user engagement and support quality.
acceptanceCriteria: New LLM model integrated and tested
Context window expanded for longer conversations
Response quality improved (measured by user ratings)

items.note: Migrated core customer and transaction data from MongoDB and Shopify into Pulse CDP creating unified customer profiles.
items.usecase: Creates a single source of truth for customer data, enabling unified segmentation and 360-degree customer view.
acceptanceCriteria: Shopify order and customer data synced
Automated sync pipeline established for future updates

items.note: Launched centralized Data Hub with data models, metrics framework, and feature engineering capabilities as foundation for analytics and ML.
items.usecase: Features: Data Models, Metrics. Enables cohort/segment creation (e.g., non-club users), powers recommendations and personalization, and supports dashboards and analytics.
acceptanceCriteria: Data models defined for core entities (users, events, transactions)
Metrics framework established with 20+ key metrics
Data Hub accessible to analytics users

items.note: Engineering advanced data features for Gold Tier analytics including aggregations, derived metrics, and behavioral indicators.
items.usecase: Supports sophisticated analytics and ML predictions with high-quality engineered features for business insights.
acceptanceCriteria: 50+ Gold Tier features engineered and validated
Features accessible via Data Hub API

items.note: Defining comprehensive data models for Gold Tier including schemas, relationships, and data quality rules.
items.usecase: Keeps data organized and consistent with clear structure for advanced analytics and reporting use cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Data model schemas defined for all Gold Tier entities

items.note: Defining Gold Tier business metrics including KPIs, aggregations, and calculated measures for executive dashboards.
items.usecase: Helps track business performance clearly with standardized, trustworthy metrics for decision-making.
acceptanceCriteria: 30+ Gold Tier metrics defined with formulas

items.note: Publishing user-facing analytics dashboards with key metrics, trends, and insights for business teams.
items.usecase: Makes data-driven insights easily accessible for teams to monitor performance and make informed decisions quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: 5+ dashboards published (overview, users, revenue, engagement, operations)

items.note: Building and finalizing ~50 ML features including propensity scores, time-series patterns, statistical measures, and behavioral indicators for recommendation models.
items.usecase: Improves recommendation model accuracy by 35% through sophisticated feature engineering and better signal extraction.

items.note: Integrating persona engine with long-term and contextual memory using Mem0 for memory management and Neo4j graph database for relationship tracking.
items.usecase: Enables deeper personalization based on user memory, behavior patterns, and relationship context for highly relevant recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: Mem0 integrated for user memory persistence
Neo4j graph database configured for relationships
Persona profiles generated for all active users
Memory retrieval optimized for recommendation queries

items.note: Building predictive recommendation models using historical (cold) data for proactive content and product suggestions based on user patterns.
items.usecase: Predicts user needs and preferences proactively using historical behavior, improving engagement by 25% through anticipatory recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: ML models trained on historical data
A/B testing framework ready for validation

items.note: Developing real-time contextual recommendation engine using live (hot) data streams for immediate, context-aware suggestions based on current behavior.
items.usecase: Delivers real-time, context-aware recommendations adapting to current user session, improving conversion rates by 30%.
acceptanceCriteria: Context window includes last 30 minutes of activity
Fallback to cold model when hot data insufficient

subtracks.name: Pages – Headless CMS
subtracks.note: A centralized content system enabling teams to create once and reuse content across the platform without engineering dependency.

items.note: Deployed headless CMS platform enabling non-technical teams to create, manage, and publish content across web, app, and email channels from single source.
items.usecase: Enables teams to manage and publish content independently without engineering dependency, reducing content update time from 2 days to 10 minutes.
acceptanceCriteria: User permissions and approval workflows configured

items.note: Introducing advanced personalization within flows using user profile data, behavioral signals, and contextual information for dynamic content adaptation.
items.usecase: Enables dynamic, user-specific flow experiences adapting content and paths in real-time to improve engagement by 40% and conversion outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: User data accessible within flow rendering
Dynamic content blocks based on user attributes
Behavioral triggers working for flow variations
A/B testing framework for personalized flows

items.note: Implementing AWS cost reduction strategies including instance rightsizing, reserved capacity planning, S3 lifecycle policies, and unused resource cleanup.
items.usecase: Improves cost efficiency by targeting 30% monthly AWS spend reduction while maintaining performance and reliability.
acceptanceCriteria: Reserved instances purchased for predictable workloads

items.note: Prepared comprehensive Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing documentation including scope, findings, remediation plans, and compliance mappings.
items.usecase: Supports security review process and regulatory compliance requirements with complete audit trail.
acceptanceCriteria: Vulnerability findings documented with severity ratings

items.note: Conducting root cause analysis for incorrect website redirects. RCA completed and potential DNS/routing issue identified; implementing fix.
items.usecase: Helps resolve incorrect redirection ensuring users reach the correct Khyaal website, preventing brand confusion and lost traffic.
acceptanceCriteria: No incorrect redirects in 7-day testing period

items.note: Migrated all file storage from AWS S3 to Google Cloud Storage (GCS) for platform consolidation and cost optimization.
items.usecase: Improves platform alignment by consolidating on GCP and reduces storage costs by 35% with better efficiency.
acceptanceCriteria: All S3 buckets migrated to GCS

items.note: Built comprehensive Grafana monitoring dashboards for infrastructure metrics, application performance, and business KPIs with real-time visualization.
items.usecase: Improves visibility into system health with centralized monitoring, reducing issue detection time from hours to minutes.

items.note: Configured automated Slack alerting for critical infrastructure and application issues with smart routing to on-call teams.
items.usecase: Speeds up incident response time by 70% through instant team notifications for critical issues.

items.note: Implemented comprehensive application performance monitoring (APM) across all production applications with distributed tracing and error tracking.
items.usecase: Helps maintain stability and performance with proactive issue detection, reducing downtime by 60%.
acceptanceCriteria: APM agents deployed on all production apps
